rhymeNotes.1770709453238: 《漢語多功能字庫》將其記作 [yŋ]，但「吳語學堂」與本文作者之一作為母語者均認為 [yn] 更為合適。由於上海話不存在齒齦鼻音 [n] 與軟顎鼻音 [ŋ] 的韻尾對立，理論上兩種標記方式皆可；本文採用 [yn]。 The Chinese Multi-function Character Database records this as [yŋ], whereas WuyuXuetang and one of the present author as a native speaker consider [yn] more appropriate. Since Shanghainese does not contrast the alveolar nasal coda [n] with the velar nasal coda [ŋ], either notation is theoretically possible; this work adopts [yn].
rhymeNotes.1770709453271: [ɪʔ] 與 [əʔ] 不構成音位對立。前者只出現在 /i/ 或 /y/ 介音之後，後者則只出現在 /u/ 介音之後或無介音的音節中。 [ɪʔ] and [əʔ] are not phonemically contrastive. The former occurs only after the medials /i/ or /y/, whereas the latter occurs only after the medial /u/ or in syllables without a medial.
rhymeNotes.1770709453272: [ɪʔ] 與 [əʔ] 不構成音位對立。前者只出現在 /i/ 或 /y/ 介音之後，後者則只出現在 /u/ 介音之後或無介音的音節中。 [ɪʔ] and [əʔ] are not phonemically contrastive. The former occurs only after the medials /i/ or /y/, whereas the latter occurs only after the medial /u/ or in syllables without a medial.
